title: Ornik
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Ornik''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The vessel, along with the [[Lance (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Lance'']] and the [[Lion (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Lion'']], were to commence an attack on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Conqueror (Imperial-class)|''Conqueror'']]. The larger warships used [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]], and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] as fighter support, and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] as back-up. The ''Conqueror'' had arrayed against them [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].

==Behind the scenes==
While the outcome depends on the player's actions it cannot be [[canon]] for the ''Conqueror'' to be destroyed as it appears in another battle and is destroyed there.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
